description_long: This is a rectangular, vertically-oriented cabinet or display case with a dark brown wooden frame and a large, clear glass or acrylic front panel. The frame is thick and solid, providing structural support around the transparent central area. The transparent panel is bordered by a slightly recessed inner frame, suggesting it may be a door or a fixed display window. The sides are narrow and appear to be made of the same wood as the frame, with no visible handles or hardware. The overall design is simple and modern, suitable for use as a wall-mounted display cabinet or a shallow storage unit in urban environments such as lobbies, hallways, or public waiting areas.
description: A rectangular, dark brown wooden cabinet or display case with a large clear glass or acrylic front panel and a simple, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular glass or acrylic panel bordered by a thick dark brown wooden frame.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the cabinet and the thickness of the wooden frame.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, nearly identical to the front, showing the glass or acrylic panel and frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and frame thickness.
